overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city street at night. The character transitions from an open intersection into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass, then emerges into a wide open area with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk transitioning to covered overpass walkway

events.description: character walks from open street into covered walkway beneath the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk and entering the covered pedestrian walkway under the overpass

notable_agents.action: dark sedan parked at the crosswalk waiting at the intersection
pedestrian in bright red pants and dark jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
large illuminated billboard displaying red and white stripes resembling an American flag
massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered walkway below
illuminated storefront signs and displays along the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city crosswalk with distinctive yellow markings, featuring a large American flag billboard visible in the distance. The character walks past a parked sedan and enters a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the open street into a sheltered corridor lined with neon storefront signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass with digital advertising displays

events.description: futuristic cars with headlights on drive past on the multi-lane road to the right
ambient light gradually increases as the walkway approaches the open exit ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the long covered pedestrian walkway beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in formal business suit walking toward the camera in the covered corridor

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboards and screens displaying colorful advertisements on the right wall
linear fluorescent lighting fixtures mounted on the concrete ceiling of the overpass
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long, covered pedestrian corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass. The sky is completely obscured by the overhead structure, with artificial fluorescent lighting illuminating the path. Digital advertisement panels line the right wall displaying vibrant neon content, while futuristic cars pass by on the adjacent road. The environment maintains a consistent enclosed atmosphere as the character approaches the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with towering skyscrapers and holographic displays

events.description: exits the covered overpass walkway into the open city intersection with visible night sky and skyscrapers
lighting shifts from artificial tunnel illumination to open night sky with ambient city glow and building lights

agents.ego_description: walking out of the covered walkway into the expansive open intersection, approaching the wide avenue lined with palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the open intersection and sidewalk
towering glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
large floating holographic advertisements and massive digital displays mounted on buildings
dark night sky visible between the tall buildings and above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open urban intersection. The scene opens up to reveal a stunning cityscape of towering futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades, illuminated against the night sky. Tall palm trees line the left side of the wide avenue, while massive holographic billboards and neon building signs create a vibrant glow. The transition from the enclosed tunnel to this expansive cyberpunk cityscape marks a dramatic shift in the environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open city street through a sheltered underpass and into a sprawling, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins at a crosswalk with yellow markings and a distant American flag billboard, moving past a parked sedan as the character enters a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. As the open sky is replaced by a heavy overhead structure, the environment shifts into an enclosed corridor illuminated by fluorescent lights and vibrant digital advertisement panels. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the tunnel, transitioning from the claustrophobic walkway into a vast intersection. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a stunning cityscape of towering glass skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and palm trees glowing under the night sky.
